text:
25/06/2025, 23:02 Permanent establishment | AUSTRAC

Australian Government
~ AUSTRAC

ermanent establishment

Home / Permanent establishment

The place where an entity carries on any activity or business in Australia or another
country. You operate at or through a permanent establishment in a country if you or your
agent:

e have physical offices or business premises in that country

¢ carry on your business in that country (even without a physical office).

See

AML/CTF Act 2006 section 21

https://www.austrac.gov.au/glossary/permanent-establishment
